examples: My films try to describe a journey of discovery, both for myself and the viewer.
Background music may aid viewer understanding by linking scenes.
The viewer sees not an actor working at his craft, but another human being struggling with life.
Franchise owners are grappling with the best way to handle the change in viewer habits.
During pre-appointment hearings before a Commons committe, Lord Patten admitted he was not an EastEnders viewer.
